opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building local-first AI agents introduces significant latency constraints when orchestrating multi-step tool calls. You'll find that devops-specific context understanding requires much richer domain ontologies than generic coding assistants get away with, otherwise the agent hallucinates commands confidently. The real bottleneck isn't LLM quality but the state machine complexity needed to track partial resolutions across distributed system state.
actions.reasoning: This discussion involves AI agents, tool orchestration, and terminal tooling—areas within my technical expertise
